name: Jumpscare Slayer
short_description: Dodge the gaze of terrifying monsters, obtain the legendary sword, and slay the monsters that threaten the world. A 3D first-person horror game in which you must solve the mysteries of the mansion, escape enemies, and find the hidden sword
detailed_description:
A first-person 3D horror game with an emphasis on jumpscares.

Your job is to explore the spooky mansion, solve mysteries, find the legendary sword, defeat the enemies and escape.

The monsters are very powerful and will quickly defeat you if they catch you. However, if you acquire the legendary sword, which is said to defeat the monsters, you will be able to counterattack and slash them.

There are also several jumpscares lurking around the mansion. Be careful with them as you advance.

And there are two game modes: "Prologue" and "Slayer Mode." Save the places from monsters with your sword

Warning

This game contains loud sounds and scare scenes.

If you feel tired while playing, take a break.

We cannot be responsible for any problems caused by playing this game.

About Streaming and uploading video

You can play this game live or upload videos at your own risk, and monetize those videos.

If possible, I would appreciate it if you could include a link to your store page in the description section
